seoTitle: How to View Typeform Responses: Results Tab Guide
metaDescription: Learn how to view and filter Typeform responses in the Results section, export submission data, and use analytics to understand your survey answers faster.
intro: If you're collecting feedback, leads, or survey data with Typeform, knowing how to actually read and use those responses matters as much as building the form. This guide walks through opening the Results section, filtering submissions, exporting the data, and pulling insights from response analytics so you can act on what people tell you.

steps.heading: Open the Results section
steps.body: From your Typeform dashboard, select the form you want to review and switch to the Results tab, where every submission is collected in one place.

steps.heading: View and filter individual responses
steps.body: Browse submissions one at a time or in a summary view, and use the filter and search tools to narrow down responses by answer, date, or completion status.

steps.heading: Export response data
steps.body: Download your results so you can work with them outside Typeform, whether that's for a spreadsheet report, a CRM import, or sharing with a team member.

steps.heading: Analyze response insights
steps.body: Use the built-in analytics to spot trends across answers, track how many people completed the form, and see which questions drop people off.

faq.question: Where do I find Typeform responses?
faq.answer: Open your form from the dashboard and click the Results tab — that's where all submitted responses live, along with summary and individual views.

faq.question: Can I filter Typeform responses by a specific answer?
faq.answer: Yes, the Results section includes filter and search tools that let you narrow submissions down by specific answers, dates, or completion status.

faq.question: How do I export Typeform response data?
faq.answer: From the Results section you can export your submission data so it can be used in a spreadsheet, reporting tool, or another system.

faq.question: Does Typeform show response analytics automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, Typeform provides built-in analytics and reporting features alongside your raw responses so you can see trends without extra setup.
